metadata.description: Naoki Yokomachi's personal Claude Code marketplace. The OSS-public cadenza plugin lives in its own repo (github.com/n-yokomachi/cadenza); this marketplace distributes private extensions only.

plugins.name: cadenza-personal
plugins.description: Personal extension to cadenza: takes the format-agnostic output.md and finishes it for specific publishing targets (Zenn / deck-style markdown for AI slide tools / LT). Not for OSS distribution.
